results.title: Argentina's Heartfelt Welcome: Fans Celebrate Team Despite World Cup Loss
results.description: Argentina's football team received an overwhelming welcome from fans upon their return after finishing second in the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Despite the disappointment of losing to Spain, supporters gathered in large numbers to celebrate the team's journey and dedication. The emotional reception highlighted a shift in perspective, as fans chose to honor their players' efforts rather than mourn the loss. This heartfelt display of loyalty served as a reminder that true support goes beyond trophies, with players feeling the love from their country as they returned home.

results.description: An employee resigned via WhatsApp after his manager rejected an anxiety leave request. The exchange has sparked a heated debate on workplace empathy and professionalism.

results.title: Viral Korean skincare brand Biodance is now in the Philippines. Here's what to get first
results.description: The Korean skincare brand behind the viral Bio-Collagen Real Deep Mask has officially arrived in the Philippines, bringing with it not only its internet-famous sheet mask but also a wide range of skincare products, from toner pads and serums to creams and facial mists. With prices in the mid-range category, deciding where to start can be overwhelming. During Biodance's Philippine launch on July 14 at The Curve in Bonifacio Global City, board-certified dermatologist Dr. Bea Chan-Benavidez shared which products are best suited for different skin concerns. For those looking to strengthen their skin barrier, Dr. Bea recommends the brand's bestselling Bio-Collagen Real Deep Mask, which focuses on hydration and improving skin elasticity. If your skin is dry, dehydrated, or easily irritated, she suggests the Hydro Cera-Nol Real Deep Mask. Formulated with ceramides and panthenol, the mask helps soothe irritation while restoring the skin's moisture barrier. Meanwhile, those dealing with dullness and uneven skin tone may benefit from the Radiant Vita Niacinamide Real Deep Mask. The formula combines niacinamide with glutathione to help brighten the complexion and improve skin clarity. For those sensitive to niacinamide, however, Dr. Bea recommends sticking to the collagen line. "In skincare products, the main ingredients can also offer secondary benefits," she told Manila Bulletin Lifestyle. "For example, hyaluronic acid is known for hydration, but when your skin is well hydrated, it regenerates faster, making the complexion look healthier and less dull." Several Biodance collections are also available as complete skincare routines, including toner pads, serums, creams, cleansers, and masks designed to work together. Aside from its bestselling products, Biodance also introduced its newest innovation, the Rejuvenating Caviar PDRN Real Deep Mask. The product combines the brand's signature hydrogel technology with caviar extract and salmon-derived PDRN (Sodium DNA), ingredients that help soothe redness while improving skin elasticity. With PDRN becoming one of skincare's biggest buzzwords, many wonder whether topical products can deliver the same benefits as injectable treatments. According to Dr. Bea, they serve different purposes. "We cannot compare topical PDRN with injectable PDRN. Injectable PDRN stimulates collagen production, accelerates healing, and promotes skin regeneration,” she explained, adding that topical PDRN products are best viewed as maintenance skincare that helps support the skin after professional treatments rather than replace injectable procedures.

results.description: CBN seizes 12 crore Tramadol tablets weighing 30 metric tonnes. Three key accused arrested from Bengaluru and Kochi under the NDPS Act. results.title: Ski Enthusiasts Flock to Sub-Saharan Africa and a Snowy Mountain Resort in Lesotho
results.description: One may not expect thousands to flock each winter to Lesotho but for many ski enthusiasts from across southern Africa, the small, landlocked mountain kingdom has become the go-to place in recent years. Lesotho's high elevation and mountainous terrain combine to make it the coldest country on the continent, with temperatures in the highlands typically plunging to minus 8 degrees Celsius (about 18 degrees Fahrenheit) between June and August.

results.title: Gary Neville tears into Argentina with 'bag of s**t' comparison after Spain World Cup final defeat
results.description: Gary Neville has launched a scathing assessment of Argentina's World Cup final performance, claiming Lionel Messi's side "played like a bag of s**t" as Spain deservedly lifted football's biggest prize. The defending champions were hoping to emulate the great Italy and Brazil sides by retaining the World Cup, but they produced an uninspiring display in New Jersey and rarely threatened Spain's goal. Argentina failed to register a shot until deep into extra time, spending almost the entire contest pinned back by Luis de la Fuente's side before Ferran Torres finally broke the deadlock in the 106th minute. Although Lionel Scaloni's men frustrated Spain for long periods with a disciplined defensive display, their physical tactics attracted widespread criticism throughout the tournament and again in the final. TRENDING Stories Videos Your Say Neville, speaking on The Overlap's Stick to Football podcast, admitted Argentina deserved credit for remaining in the contest for so long but insisted there could be no disguising the quality of their performance. "I did say that my first comments were to admire them," Neville said. "But they played terribly, let's be clear, they played poorly in the game. "What I'd say is: if they stayed in the game, you've got to hand it to them. Well done to them, but they played like a bag of s***." The former Manchester United defender also argued Argentina's remarkable run to a second successive World Cup final was only possible because of Messi's brilliance. The 39-year-old captain scored eight goals during the tournament and repeatedly rescued his country as they fought their way through the knockout stages. Without him, Neville believes Argentina would never have come close to another appearance in the final. "If it looks like s**t and it smells like s**t, it's s**t to be fair," he continued. LATEST SPORTS NEWS: Lionel Messi breaks silence on Argentina's World Cup final defeat to Spain Alan Shearer and footballing world pay tribute to Kevin Keegan describing him as 'hero' and 'friend' Conor McGregor gives injury update after suffering nightmare defeat in UFC return "What we watched in the final was a performance that was poor, and they've played poorly at times. "But they've got massive chemistry and fierce competitiveness that gets them through, and they've got an incredible player up top who gets them over the line. "Without him, I said this in the last tournament, they're a team that would probably struggle to get to the same point." Former Arsenal striker Ian Wright also reflected on Argentina's defeat, admitting he felt sorry for Messi after seeing the veteran reduced to tears, while maintaining Spain were worthy champions. "I'm delighted that Argentina didn't win but I am sad, I didn't like to see Messi crying like that, you saw what it meant to him," Wright said. "But I'm quite happy for Spain." Messi was visibly emotional after the final whistle, remaining on the pitch as Spain celebrated their triumph. Argentina's players also declined to conduct post-match interviews and chose not to stay on the field to watch their opponents lift the trophy. The defeat brought an end to another dramatic World Cup campaign for Scaloni's side, who had fought back from difficult positions against both Egypt and England before their luck finally ran out in the final. Breaking his silence on social media the following day, Messi thanked supporters and congratulated Spain after the heartbreaking defeat. "The pain is immense, and this wound will take time to heal," he wrote on Instagram. "But I also hold onto all the good things... The matches we turned around by giving it our all - moments that will remain in our memories forever - and the support of an entire country which, combined with this group's hard work and effort, brought us back among the world's elite once again. "It is hard to fully appreciate our achievement right now, but this group reached two consecutive World Cup finals. Thank you from the bottom of my heart for every greeting and message. "Once again, we managed to unite as a country and stand together, sharing the immense pride of being Argentine. I also want to congratulate Spain on winning the championship." Our Standards: The GB News Editorial Charter

results.title: Elgar Parishad case: SC Justice S Chandrashekhar recuses from hearing Gadling's bail plea
results.description: Justice Shree Chandrashekhar recused himself from hearing advocate Surendra Gadling's bail plea. This marks the third judge to recuse from the Elgar Parishad case matter. Gadling has been incarcerated for over seven years, seeking an urgent hearing. His bail plea has faced multiple adjournments in the Supreme Court. Gadling faces charges of aiding Maoists and conspiring in the Elgar Parishad case.

results.title: 1st LD-Writethru: China permits injured personnel transfer from illegally "grounded" Philippine vessel at Ren'ai Jiao
results.description: BEIJING, July 21 (Xinhua) -- A China Coast Guard (CCG) spokesperson announced that, out of humanitarian considerations, Chinese authorities on Tuesday morning permitted the transfer of injured personnel from a Philippine vessel that was illegally "grounded" at China's Ren'ai Jiao in the South China Sea.
